goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 != x0 and x2.is_close(x0, x1) implies difference_quotient(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x0, x2).is_close(f(x0) * dg + g(x0) * df, k0) }) } }

exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { x1 != x0 and x1.is_close(x0, k0) implies difference_quotient(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x0, x1).is_close(f(x0) * dg + g(x0) * df, bad_eps) } }
proof: function(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 = x0 or not x2.is_close(x0, k0) or difference_quotient(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x0, x2).is_close(f(x0) * dg + g(x0) * df, x1) } } }(bad_eps)

let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { x1 = x0 or not x1.is_close(x0, w0) or difference_quotient(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x0, x1).is_close(f(x0) * dg + g(x0) * df, bad_eps) } }

(forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0 != x0 and k0.is_close(x0, x2) and not difference_quotient(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x0, k0).is_close(f(x0) * dg + g(x0) * df, bad_eps) } } = true)

function(x1: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 = x0 or not x2.is_close(x0, x1) or difference_quotient(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x0, x2).is_close(f(x0) * dg + g(x0) * df, bad_eps) }) }(w0)
function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x2, k0) } = differentiable_at(x1, x2) }(f, x0)
function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x2, k0) } = differentiable_at(x1, x2) }(g, x0)

goal: has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x0, f(x0) * dg + g(x0) * df)
exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x0, k0) }
proof: has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x0, f(x0) * dg + g(x0) * df)
function(x1: Real) { not has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x0, x1) }(f(x0) * dg + g(x0) * df)
let w0: Real satisfy { has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x0, w0) }
function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x2, k0) } = differentiable_at(x1, x2) }(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x0)

goal: has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, f), x0, f(x0) * d + f(x0) * d)
